_note: Turkish financial-press RSS feeds for the banking-sector news feed (source='press' in news_items). These are GENERAL economy/finance feeds; src/news/sources/press.py keeps only banking-relevant items via keyword match (RELEVANCE_KEYWORDS). Hand-edited via PR, like data/banks/audit_report_urls.json. A feed that 404s or breaks is logged and skipped at scrape time — it never fails the run. Only headline + link + short snippet are stored (no full article body) to respect outlet copyright/ToS; the card links out to the original.

_removed.hurriyet_ekonomi: https://www.hurriyet.com.tr/rss/ekonomi — feed is not a clean rolling window: ~44 of its 100 items are a frozen Oct-2024 block that never rotates out, so it injected stale year-old 'news'. Dropped 2026-06-06. Re-add only if Hürriyet fixes the feed.
